overview.description: ASML Holding N.V. provides lithography solutions for the development, production, marketing, sales, upgrading, and servicing of advanced semiconductor equipment systems. The company offers lithography, metrology, and inspection systems. It also provides extreme ultraviolet lithography systems; and deep ultraviolet lithography systems comprising immersion and dry lithography systems solutions to manufacture various range of semiconductor nodes and technologies. In addition, the company offers metrology and inspection systems, including YieldStar...
overview.financialIntro: In 2025, ASML Holding's revenue was 32.67 billion, an increase of 15.58% compared to the previous year's 28.26 billion. Earnings were 9.61 billion, an increase of 26.91%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 43 analysts, the average rating for ASML stock is "Strong Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $1,830.83, which is an increase of 3.37% from the latest price.
